about.title: About us
about.intro: UzBron is an online platform for booking hotels and bus tickets across Uzbekistan. Our goal is to make travel easy, reliable and affordable for everyone.
about.mission: By bringing local hotels and bus companies together on a single platform, we offer customers transparent prices and a convenient booking experience.

values.title: Trust
values.text: Every booking is safe and guaranteed. Prices are transparent, with no hidden fees.

values.title: Convenience
values.text: Book a hotel or bus in a few steps — from any device.

values.title: Local focus
values.text: Built for the Uzbek market: payments in soum, service in Uzbek.

help.title: Help center
help.subtitle: Frequently asked questions

faqs.q: How do I make a booking?
faqs.a: Search for a hotel or bus, choose the right option and click "Book". Confirmation is done via an SMS code sent to your phone number.
You can pay via Click, Payme, Uzcard, Humo or cash. The payment method is selected during booking.
Yes, you can cancel a booking in the "My bookings" section of your account. Refund terms depend on the selected fare.
Bonuses are earned for every booking. Accumulated bonuses can be used on future bookings.

help.contactTitle: Didn't find an answer to your question?

sections.heading: 1. General terms
sections.body: By using the UzBron platform, you agree to these terms. The platform acts as an intermediary for booking hotel and bus services.

sections.heading: 2. Booking and payment
sections.body: All prices are shown in Uzbek soum (UZS). A booking takes effect once payment is made or confirmed.

sections.heading: 3. Cancellation and refunds
sections.body: Cancellation terms depend on the service provider's fare. Refund amounts are calculated according to the selected cancellation policy.

sections.heading: 4. Privacy
sections.body: Your personal data is used only to provide services and is not disclosed to third parties.
